id: ステップ0--rrstudiocodexをインストール
what: ステップ0. R、RStudio、Codexをインストール
title: Getting started－チャットの方が得意な研究者のためのAI & Rワークフロー
text: R本体をインストールする RStudioインストーラーをPositサイトからダウンロード CodexインストーラーをOpenAIサイトからダウンロード

id: ステップ1--プロジェクトフォルダ作成airsetup
what: ステップ1. プロジェクトフォルダ作成（airsetup）
title: Getting started－チャットの方が得意な研究者のためのAI & Rワークフロー
text: AGENTS.md QC_STATUS.md AGENTS.mdを通じて、AI作業領域とR作業領域を分離し、品質管理を行うようにAIに指示する QC_SKILL_CONTEXT.md QC_SKILL_PLAN.md QC_SKILL_RESULT.md SKILLS_INDEX.md
code: library(airsetup)  root_dir <- "C:/demo" ai_visible_dir <- "C:/demo/ai_project/ai_visible_data" ai_hidden_dir <- "C:/demo/r_project/ai_hidden_data" source_dir <- "C:/demo/ai_project/source"  airsetup(root_dir) airskill(root_dir)

id: ステップ2--プロジェクトフォルダへのファイル格納
what: ステップ2. プロジェクトフォルダへのファイル格納
title: Getting started－チャットの方が得意な研究者のためのAI & Rワークフロー
text: AIがアクセスできるダミーデータと非公開の実データを、対応するフォルダ構造に配置する このデモでは、ダミーデータとして、cifmodelingパッケージに含まれているデータフレームから抽出した、最初の3行を用いる 以下のRコードによって、コンテキスト・ダミーデータがプロジェクトフォルダに格納されるはずである
code: # データの冒頭と構造を確認 library(cifmodeling) data(prostate, package = "cifmodeling") head(prostate) str(prostate)  # R実行用のデータ保存 ai_visible_dir <- "C:/demo/ai_project/ai_visible_data" ai_hidden_dir <- "C:/demo/r_project/ai_hidden_data" source_dir <- "C:/demo/ai_project/source"  demodata <- prostate out_file <- file.path(ai_hidden_dir, "demodata.rds") saveRDS(demodata, out_file)  # AIが構造確認に用いるダミーデータ保存 demodata <- head(demodata, 3) out_file <- file.path(ai_visible_dir, "demodata.rds") saveRDS(demodata, out_file)  # AIのコンテキスト情報としてRdを保存 rd_list <- tools::Rd_db(package = "cifmodeling") rd_name <- grep("prostate", names(rd_list), value = TRUE) rd <- rd_list[[rd_name[1]]] tools::Rd2txt(   rd,   out = file.path(source_dir, "data_definition_demodata.txt") ) rd_list <- tools::Rd_db(package = "cifmodeling") rd_name <- grep("cifplot", names(rd_list), value = TRUE) rd <- rd_list[[rd_name[1]]] tools::Rd2txt(   rd,   out = file.path(source_dir, "help_cifplot.txt") )

id: ステップ3--codexプロジェクトの開始
what: ステップ3. Codexプロジェクトの開始
title: Getting started－チャットの方が得意な研究者のためのAI & Rワークフロー
text: Codexを起動し、プロジェクトフォルダとしてai_projectフォルダを指定する Codexにプロンプトを入力する
code: プロンプト「プロジェクトフォルダ内のファイルを確認してください」

id: ステップ4--ユーザーとcodexによるコーディングプランの確認
what: ステップ4. ユーザーとCodexによるコーディングプランの確認
title: Getting started－チャットの方が得意な研究者のためのAI & Rワークフロー
text: Codexにプロンプトを入力する Rスクリプトのコーディングプランを立てさせ、チャットを通じてプランが適切かどうか確認する
code: プロンプト「demodata.rds、data_definition_demodata.txt、help_cifplot.txtを参照してください。 関心イベントはがん死亡です。がん死亡以外の死亡は競合リスクとして扱います。 イベント変数 epsilon のコーディングは、0 = alive/censored、1 = cancer death、2 = non-cancer death の 予定です。まずQCスキルを使い、コンテキストがRコーディングに進めるほど明確か評価してください」 プロンプト「QCの結果を踏まえて、Rスクリプトのコーディングプランを立ててください」 プロンプト「QCスキルを使い、コーディングプランを評価してください」

id: ステップ5--codexによるrコーディングとqc
what: ステップ5. CodexによるRコーディングとQC
title: Getting started－チャットの方が得意な研究者のためのAI & Rワークフロー
text: Codexにプロンプトを入力する Rスクリプトをコーディングさせ、必要に応じてチャットで質問を行い、正しいかどうか確認する
code: プロンプト「Rスクリプトを書いてください。AI確認用ダミーデータ用のRスクリプトと R実行用の実データ解析スクリプトの両方が必要です。RStudioの作業ディレクトリに注意してください。 手動で指定する必要がない方が望ましいです」

what: ステップ6. RStudioによるR実行
title: Getting started－チャットの方が得意な研究者のためのAI & Rワークフロー
text: ai_outputに生成されたRスクリプトをRStudioに読み込ませて、実行する RStudioの作業ディレクトリに注意すること。作業ディレクトリに依存するコードは、環境によって動かないことがある その場合は、入力するデータセットの場所を指定すると解決するかもしれない または、作業ディレクトリを手動で設定することもできる
code: options(DEMODATA_RDS = "C:/demo/r_project/ai_hidden_data/demodata.rds") setwd("C:/demo/r_project/ai_hidden_data")

id: ステップ7--ユーザーとcodexによる結果の確認
what: ステップ7. ユーザーとCodexによる結果の確認
title: Getting started－チャットの方が得意な研究者のためのAI & Rワークフロー
text: ai_outputに生成されたCIF曲線を確認する Codexのサポートを受けながら、解析結果が正しいか最終レビューを行う

title: Getting started
text: Start creating project split mode. creates two sibling folders: ai_project/ workspace AI agents may inspect. r_project/ local R execution workspace hidden analysis data. hard access-control system. project structure set working rules make boundary explicit.
code: library(airsetup)  airsetup(   path = "example-analysis",   mode = "split",   japanese = TRUE ) example-analysis/ +-- ai_project/ +-- r_project/

title: Getting started
text: ai_project/ contains materials support AI-assisted work. main folders : source/, analysis instructions source materials; ai_visible_data/, dummy visible data AI may inspect; ai_output/, scripts helper files generated AI; r_output/, outputs created user runs R scripts; qc/, QC evidence review materials; log/, notes decision records. generated AGENTS.md describes project rules. generated QC_STATUS.md gives QC status open review items stable entry point.

what: Keep hidden analysis data outside AI inspection
title: Getting started
text: split mode, r_project/ created next ai_project/. folder intended local R execution hidden analysis data. AI agents inspect r_project/ai_hidden_data/ directly. visible hidden data areas can share internal structure:
code: ai_project/ai_visible_data/initial/ r_project/ai_hidden_data/initial/

what: Put visible and hidden data in matching paths
title: Getting started
text: example, place small visible prostate.csv : place full analysis dataset file name : Using file name lets AI agents design scripts visible data lets R run scripts hidden data changing input root. prostate example, visible data can small CSV columns full dataset. source notes describe variables : patno, patient number; rx, treatment assignment; dtime, follow-time; status, event status; age, age baseline; hg, hemoglobin level; bm, bone metastases indicator. exact statistical analysis intentionally outside airsetup. package prepares workflow boundary.
code: ai_project/ai_visible_data/initial/prostate.csv r_project/ai_hidden_data/initial/prostate.csv

title: Getting started
text: Place analysis instructions : instructions say create, write outputs, data boundaries must respected. typical request Codex might : Follow analysis instructions source/initial/. Create R scripts ai_output/. Use ai_visible_data/initial/ inspect column names file structure. list, open, copy, summarize, otherwise inspect ../r_project/ai_hidden_data/. request matches generated AGENTS.md: AI agents may use visible data design scripts, hidden data stays outside direct AI inspection.
code: ai_project/source/initial/

title: Getting started
text: user runs R scripts locally. Scripts may write outputs : QC materials can written : airsetup force one QC method. project might use double programming, output review, row-count checks, discrepancy tables, another context-specific check. example, double-programming QC workflow : create time event variables Algorithm ; create variables Algorithm B; compare implementations; save comparison table qc/; record status QC-001 QC_STATUS.md. QC_STATUS.md declaration QC complete. running status file: checked, evidence , still needs human review.
code: ai_project/r_output/ ai_project/qc/

title: Getting started
text: Use aircheck() verify required folders files exist. aircheck() returns data frame one row per required item. reports whether folder file found. makes easy confirm workspace still structure AI-assisted analysis depends .
code: aircheck("example-analysis", mode = "split")

title: Authors and Citation
text: gestimation Toolkit. Author, maintainer.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Toolkit g (2026). airsetup: AI-Assisted R Workflow QC Clear Boundaries. R package version 0.0.2, https://github.com/gestimation/airsetup.
code: @Manual{,   title = {airsetup: AI-Assisted R Workflow with QC and Clear Boundaries},   author = {gestimation Toolkit},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.0.2},   url = {https://github.com/gestimation/airsetup}, }

title: airsetup
text: Clear boundaries, flexible QC, traceable structure AI-assisted R analysis. airsetup creates small, opinionated folder structure R analysis projects AI agents help write scripts, inspect visible dummy data, review outputs, hidden analysis data stays outside AI-visible workspace. provide statistical analysis functions. Instead, prepares separated folders, minimal AGENTS.md, QC_STATUS.md tracker, optional lightweight QC skill templates context review, plan review, result review.

title: airsetup
text: can install development version airsetup GitHub :
code: # install.packages("devtools") devtools::install_github("gestimation/airsetup")

title: airsetup
text: split mode, airsetup() creates two sibling folders: example split project root
code: library(airsetup)  project_dir <- file.path(tempdir(), "my_analysis")  airsetup(   path = project_dir,   mode = "split",   japanese = TRUE )  aircheck(project_dir, mode = "split") airskill(project_dir) my_analysis/ +-- ai_project/ +-- r_project/

title: airsetup
text: ai_project/ workspace AI agents may inspect edit according project rules. example AI project folder contains folders source materials, AI-visible data, AI-generated files, R outputs, QC evidence, logs: source/: source specifications, reference documents, analysis instructions. ai_visible_data/: dummy visible data AI agents may inspect. ai_output/: scripts supporting files generated AI agents. r_output/: outputs produced R scripts run user. qc/: QC evidence, review materials, comparison files, discrepancy notes. log/: notes, decision records, investigation logs. AGENTS.md: working rules AI agents. QC_STATUS.md: current QC status open review items. split mode, r_project/ also created next ai_project/. example R project folder contains hidden-data area local reminders: ai_hidden_data/: analysis data AI agents must inspect directly. .gitignore: defaults avoid committing hidden analysis data. README_DO_NOT_SHARE_WITH_AI.md: local reminder folder human/R execution, AI inspection.

title: airsetup
text: package separates AI can inspect R can use real analysis. visible hidden data areas share internal structure: example, dummy empty data set prostate.csv may placed ai_project/ai_visible_data/initial/, real data set prostate.csv file name data structure may placed r_project/ai_hidden_data/initial/. example AI-visible data folder example AI-hidden data folder lets AI agents design scripts visible data R scripts can run hidden data changing input root, without asking AI inspect hidden files.
code: ai_project/ai_visible_data/initial/ r_project/ai_hidden_data/initial/

title: airsetup
text: generated AGENTS.md intentionally practical. tells AI agents: folders may inspect; ../r_project/ai_hidden_data/ must listed, opened, copied, summarized, otherwise inspected; place generated scripts supporting files; R outputs QC evidence live; check QC_STATUS.md substantive work; distinguish AI risk assessment user-approved QC decisions; ask human approval decision requires domain judgment. generated file access-control mechanism. project-level working rule makes boundary explicit repeatable.

title: airsetup
text: airsetup prescribe one QC method. project might use double programming, output review, row-count checks, discrepancy tables, another context-specific workflow. package simply gives QC stable place: qc/ evidence review materials; QC_STATUS.md current status, open questions, human review items; log/ decisions investigation notes matter later. data batches, scripts, outputs, QC evidence evolve, structure keeps materials separated instead mixing one working directory.

what: What the QC skills are for
title: airsetup
text: generated skill files intended support self-checking steps AI-assisted R workflow. QC_SKILL_CONTEXT.md: checks whether supplied analysis context clear enough drafting plan generating R code. QC_SKILL_PLAN.md: checks whether coding plan SAP clear enough R implementation. QC_SKILL_RESULT.md: checks whether analysis results internally consistent, traceable, aligned plan, safe interpret. SKILLS_IDEX.md: explains skill files. skills use compact QC report format domain-level status, issue severity, readiness next steps, -assess items, AI assumption risks, recommended handoff actions. intentionally lightweight. Pass skills mean formal statistical approval, independent validation, regulatory approval, final scientific acceptance.

what: Check an airsetup project structure — aircheck
title: Check an airsetup project structure — aircheck
text: Check airsetup project structure

title: Check an airsetup project structure — aircheck
code: aircheck(path, mode = c("split", "ai_only"))

title: Check an airsetup project structure — aircheck
text: path Parent project directory check. mode Project layout mode check. "split" checks sibling ai_project r_project folders. "ai_only" checks ai_project.

title: Check an airsetup project structure — aircheck
text: data.frame columns item, type, path, exists, required, message.

title: Check an airsetup project structure — aircheck

what: airsetup: project setup for AI-assisted R workflows — airsetup-package
title: airsetup: project setup for AI-assisted R workflows — airsetup-package
text: Lightweight project scaffolding AI-assisted R analysis workflows.

title: airsetup: project setup for AI-assisted R workflows — airsetup-package
text: Maintainer: gestimation Toolkit maintainer@example.com

what: Set up an AI-assisted analysis project structure — airsetup
title: Set up an AI-assisted analysis project structure — airsetup
text: Set AI-assisted analysis project structure

title: Set up an AI-assisted analysis project structure — airsetup
code: airsetup(   path,   mode = c("split", "ai_only"),   japanese = FALSE,   overwrite = FALSE )

title: Set up an AI-assisted analysis project structure — airsetup
text: path Parent directory create update. mode Project layout mode. "split" creates sibling ai_project r_project folders. "ai_only" creates ai_project. japanese Logical. TRUE, generated AGENTS.md instructs Codex write narrative output documents Japanese default. FALSE, instructs Codex use English default. override scripts, source code, schemas, explicit user instructions. overwrite Logical. TRUE, overwrite generated files already exist.

title: Set up an AI-assisted analysis project structure — airsetup
text: Invisibly returns normalized parent path.

what: Add AI & R QC skill templates — airskill
title: Add AI & R QC skill templates — airskill
text: airskill() adds lightweight QC skill Markdown files existing airsetup project. files written ai_project/source/skills/.

title: Add AI & R QC skill templates — airskill
code: airskill(   path = ".",   skills = c("context", "plan", "result"),   overwrite = FALSE,   quiet = FALSE )

title: Add AI & R QC skill templates — airskill
text: path Project root created airsetup(). skills Character vector skills add. Supported values "context", "plan", "result". overwrite Logical. FALSE, existing files overwritten. quiet Logical. TRUE, suppress messages.

title: Add AI & R QC skill templates — airskill
text: data frame columns file, path, status, overwritten.

title: Add AI & R QC skill templates — airskill
code: project_dir <- file.path(tempdir(), "airskill_example") airsetup(project_dir, mode = "ai_only") airskill(project_dir) #> created: ai_project/source/skills/SKILLS_INDEX.md #> created: ai_project/source/skills/QC_SKILL_CONTEXT.md #> created: ai_project/source/skills/QC_SKILL_PLAN.md #> created: ai_project/source/skills/QC_SKILL_RESULT.md #>                  file                                         path  status #> 1     SKILLS_INDEX.md     ai_project/source/skills/SKILLS_INDEX.md created #> 2 QC_SKILL_CONTEXT.md ai_project/source/skills/QC_SKILL_CONTEXT.md created #> 3    QC_SKILL_PLAN.md    ai_project/source/skills/QC_SKILL_PLAN.md created #> 4  QC_SKILL_RESULT.md  ai_project/source/skills/QC_SKILL_RESULT.md created #>   overwritten #> 1       FALSE #> 2       FALSE #> 3       FALSE #> 4       FALSE airskill(project_dir, skills = c("context", "plan")) #> skipped: ai_project/source/skills/SKILLS_INDEX.md #> skipped: ai_project/source/skills/QC_SKILL_CONTEXT.md #> skipped: ai_project/source/skills/QC_SKILL_PLAN.md #>                  file                                         path  status #> 1     SKILLS_INDEX.md     ai_project/source/skills/SKILLS_INDEX.md skipped #> 2 QC_SKILL_CONTEXT.md ai_project/source/skills/QC_SKILL_CONTEXT.md skipped #> 3    QC_SKILL_PLAN.md    ai_project/source/skills/QC_SKILL_PLAN.md skipped #>   overwritten #> 1       FALSE #> 2       FALSE #> 3       FALSE
